content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty +0.48% with breadth tilted toward Realty (+2.24%), Metal (+0.98%), Pharma (+0.77%), and Energy. IT lagging (-0.99%). VIX at 18.32 still elevated. Book is well-deployed at 56% with 11 names across diverse sectors; today's tape gave us favorable moves on PNBHOUSING, ADANIPORTS, BAJFINANCE, BANDHANBNK, HAL while MARUTI and GOLDBEES drag. Priority is trailing SLs on winners and not stacking new positions into an already-broad book.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1020.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.1%, faded from intraday high 1057 to 1044. Per trailing SL mandate (P&L >= +4%, trail to max(entry, last - 2%)), trail SL up from 1035 to 1020 — wait, that loosens. Keep at 1035 which already locks +5.2% gain. Actually 1035 is current SL; new SL must be tighter. Setting 1020 would loosen — INVALID. Skip MODIFY, emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: SL already at 1035 locks in +5.2% gain. Stock faded from 1057 to 1044 intraday but holding above VWAP 1049 and pivot 1044. Daily uptrend intact (above SMA20/50/200). Target 1110 still feasible. SL 1035 is already 0.84% below CMP — tight enough; further tightening would risk noise stopout. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold position -2.2%. Gold thesis (central bank buying, geopolitical premium, INR weakness) intact. SL 119 gives ~2.7% downside cushion from CMP 122.26. Macro hedge value justifies hold despite minor drawdown. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "new_target": 25.20,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL already at 23.85 = entry 23.65 + 0.20, locks small gain. Position +1.6%. Pharma sector momentum (+0.77% today, LAURUS/CONCORD/LALPATH all up). Current SL is essentially breakeven. No change needed — this would be a no-op MODIFY. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.6%, intraday made high 966 then faded to 949. SL 950 is now slightly above entry — virtually at CMP. Per trail-gap discipline, SL must sit at least 0.5% below LTP; 950 vs 949.55 violates that (SL above LTP). However tightening the SL here would auto-stop. Bajfinance Q4 was strong (PAT +22%, AUM Rs 5L Cr crossed). Thesis intact. The correct action: leave SL where it was originally (entry-based was likely lower). Cannot loosen — HOLD with awareness that SL 950 may trigger on minor noise. Accept the tight stop."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.80,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.0%, strong sector-leading day (+4.12%), broke 52-week high (1672 prior). Q4 beat (PAT +9.4%, EBITDA +20%, record cargo 500 MMT), Jefferies positive. Per trailing SL mandate at +2% — move SL from 1700 (breakeven) to 1710 to lock in small gain. SL 1710 sits 1.13% below CMP 1729.50 — meets trail-gap discipline. Target 1790 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.4% after sharp gap-up failure (high 1600, closed 1534). Board meeting May 14 (Q4 results + dividend) is binary catalyst within 7 sessions — per binary-event discipline, this position must be either exited, trimmed to <=5%, or have a tightened SL. SL 1510 is 1.6% below CMP — already reasonably tight. Position size ~4.6% of portfolio (small). Holding into event is acceptable given sub-5% sizing. Keep SL at 1510."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.2%. Stock made high 13976 then collapsed to 13470. Bearish intraday reversal but daily structure still constructive (record April sales +33%, MACD bullish). SL 13400 is 0.84% below CMP — tight. Above SMA50 13625. Hold to SL or rebound. Auto sector tailwind from GST cut intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.5%. Stock spiked to 212.66 then faded — entry was at 209, near top of intraday range. Massive volume (8.2x), Q4 PAT +68% YoY. SL 204 is 1.8% below CMP. Thesis (WB election + Q4 print + MFI cycle turn) intact. Keep SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.5% intraday but stock +4.81% on day; entry caught the spike. F414 JV catalyst + new CMD + GE engine deliveries support thesis. SL 4480 is 1.78% below CMP 4561 — adequate. Defence sector P/E stretched but momentum still leadership. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.6%. Realty sector leader today (+2.11% sector). Board meeting May 11 (Q4 results + dividend) is binary catalyst within 5 sessions — per binary-event discipline, monitor closely. Position size small (~5% of portfolio). SL 495 is 2.7% below CMP 508.90 — adequate. DC theme + post-election sentiment intact. Hold but flag for risk-trim review on Day-18."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.9%. Q4 results announcement TODAY (board meeting May 4) is a binary event happening NOW — per binary-event discipline, this should ideally have been event-sized at <=5% of capital, which it is (~4.8%). Concall May 6. SL 360 is 3.3% below CMP 372.75 — slightly wide but absorbs result-day volatility. Hyundai/Kia EV MoU is differentiated catalyst. Hold through event given small size."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1035 already locks +5.2% gain; tightening further risks noise stopout (would be flush with intraday support). Let target 1110 or trail at next leg."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive macro hedge, thesis intact, SL 119 adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 23.85 already locks gain at entry+. Pharma sector strong today."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 950 essentially at CMP — risk of immediate stopout on noise. Cannot loosen per rules. Accept the tight stop; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock breakeven+0.6%. Sector breakout, Q4 beat, target 1790 still in play."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 binary May 14 within event window. Small position size acceptable; SL 1510 already tight."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 13400 tight at 0.84%; daily trend intact above SMA50."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Volume + earnings thesis intact; SL 204 adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defence momentum + F414 catalyst; SL 4480 adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 binary May 11 — within 5 sessions, position small. Re-evaluate Day-18."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 result event today; position pre-sized at <=5% per event-trade discipline."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "LAURUSLABS — strong CDMO momentum but at 52-week high; would prefer pullback to 1130-1140 zone for entry. LALPATHLAB — +12.83% then faded sharply from 1640 to 1577 (climax-style action, distribution risk); avoid chasing. CONCORDBIO — research flags BEARISH (9M FY26 revenue -5%, margin compression, trades above consensus PT) — skip despite volume surge. ADANIGREEN — Q4 EPS miss, prefer not to add Adani-cluster exposure on top of held ADANIPORTS. CESC, BHEL, BAJAJ-AUTO, KOTAKBANK, RELIANCE, SUNPHARMA, MANAPPURAM, RRKABEL, DLF, SYNGENE — interesting setups but book already at 56% deployed across 11 names; adding more concentrates correlation risk and stretches monitoring bandwidth.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is constructively positioned: 11 names, 56% deployed, +0.77% on day. No new entries today — diversification is sufficient and several positions (GESHIP, EXIDEIND, ANANTRAJ) face binary events within next 5-10 sessions which already consume risk budget. Key actionable: trail ADANIPORTS SL to 1710 to lock the breakout. PNBHOUSING and BAJFINANCE both showed intraday distribution from highs — monitor for thesis-break signals tomorrow. Performance context (5-day win rate 16% but profit factor 3.4x) suggests current strategy of letting winners run while cutting losses fast is working — stay disciplined, don't churn."
}
